headline: Reasons to Retain QuidelOrtho Stock in Your Portfolio for Now
summary: QDEL's strong portfolio, cost-saving progress and mixed first-quarter results support growth, though respiratory reliance remains a risk.

headline: LivaNova Reports Improved OSA Outcomes With PolySync Programming
summary: LIVN's PolySync data show an 84.5% AHI response rate in OSA patients, building on OSPREY results for its aura6000 System.
